title: Repurposed Structures - Wizards Compat Datapack
description: Add Wizard's towers to Repurposed Structures Villages
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Wizards. You will find the wizard towers in some RS Overworld Villages! Prepare to be casting spells!

- Wizards mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric

![All new wizard towers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hl0bs6jf/images/52fd4f5851cca652f35ed99cce9994c68c59d00e.png)

**Note:** For people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
